mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ai_chat_message ORDER BY message_id

SELECT t.* FROM ( -- 子查询：先按主键ID倒序取最新的N条（雪花ID大=插入晚=最新） SELECT * FROM ai_chat_message WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY message_id DESC LIMIT #{limitNum}) t -- 外层查询：将这N条数据按主键ID正序排列 ORDER BY t.message_id
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO ai_chat_message (message_id, session_id, parent_msg_id, task_id, user_id, role, content, split_content, is_temp, sort_timestamp) VALUES ( #{messageId}, #{sessionId}, #{parentMsgId}, #{taskId}, #{userId}, #{role}, #{content}, #{splitContentJson}, #{isTemp}, #{sortTimestamp} )

INSERT IGNORE INTO ai_chat_message (message_id, session_id, parent_msg_id, task_id, user_id, role, content, split_content, is_temp, sort_timestamp) VALUES ( #{messageId}, #{sessionId}, #{parentMsgId}, #{taskId}, #{userId}, #{role}, '[AI_STREAM_PLACEHOLDER]', #{splitContentJson}, 1, IFNULL(#{sortTimestamp}, 0) )
mapper.select: select * from ai_chat_message where session_id = #{sessionId} and user_id = #{userId} and role = 1 order by create_time desc limit 1
